🙏 Prayer Request
Support Our Mission

Prayer Support

Stand with us in intercession for the Gospel, families, pastors, children, widows, and every open door.

Prayer Covering

The work moves through prayer

Prayer is the faithful foundation beneath every mission, conference, outreach, broadcast, church project, and act of compassionate care. When you pray with us, you stand beside the ministry in the most important work of all.

Pray With Us For

Fresh strength for pastors and village leaders

Provision for children, widows, and families in care

Open doors for Gospel outreach and media ministry

Unity, wisdom, and protection for every ministry team

"Continue earnestly in prayer, being vigilant in it with thanksgiving." - Colossians 4:2

Prayer Request

Share Your Prayer Need

All prayer requests are kept completely confidential and prayed over with care.

Your request is confidential and will be prayed over with care.

Every Day

Daily Intercession

Pray for protection, provision, and spiritual strength over every ministry effort.

Every Friday - 07:30 PM

Friday Fasting Prayer

Remember the Friday fasting prayer and all families who send prayer needs.

Last Friday - 09:00 PM onwards

All Night Prayer

Stand with the monthly all night prayer as the ministry seeks God together.

How to Pray

Cover every open door

These prayer points help partners around the world pray with clarity and unity for Savior's Heartbeat Ministries.

Protection in the Field

Pray for pastors, missionaries, families, and ministry teams serving in villages and outreach gatherings.

Open Hearts

Ask God to prepare hearts to receive the Gospel through crusades, worship services, television, and SPANDANA magazine.

Churches and Leaders

Cover new church plants, building projects, pastors conferences, and local leaders with wisdom and unity.

Children and Widows

Lift up the children, widows, and vulnerable families receiving care, dignity, education, and spiritual encouragement.

Stand With Us

A faithful prayer partner strengthens the mission.

Broadcast Ministry

Pray that every broadcast carries hope into homes and reaches people at the right moment.

Prayer Requests

Pray for every family, believer, and seeker who shares a need with the ministry.

✦ Sunday Worship: 10:30 AM & 07:30 PM✦ Fasting Prayer: Every Friday 07:30 PM✦ Youth Meeting: Sunday 02:00 PM✦ Sunday School: Every Sunday during Worship Service✦ All Night Prayers: Last Friday 09:00 PM onwards✦ Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh✦ Sunday Worship: 10:30 AM & 07:30 PM✦ Fasting Prayer: Every Friday 07:30 PM✦ Youth Meeting: Sunday 02:00 PM✦ Sunday School: Every Sunday during Worship Service✦ All Night Prayers: Last Friday 09:00 PM onwards✦ Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh
Savior's Heartbeat
Ministries · Est. 1976

Preaching and Preparing People for HIS Coming. Serving communities across India with the transforming love of Jesus Christ since 1976.

“God Holy Spirit may touch you and speak to your heart to fulfill the Savior's Heartbeat.”

📞304 620 1974☎+91 7399577999✉saviorsheartbeatin@gmail.com
📍Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India
